name: Fresh Dandelion Leaf Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Pound Beets, Scrubbed With Tops, Trimmed To 1/2 Inch
2 Tablespoons Sherry Vinegar Or Red Wine Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a rack in the center of the oven and heat to 425 degrees.
2. Wrap the beets individually in foil, sealing the edges.
3. Bake until they are easily pierced with a tip of a knife (35 minutes to 1 hour depending on their size).
4. When cool enough to handle, slip off the skins and cut the beets into 1/2 inch cubes.
5. Wash the dandelion leaves well to remove all sand and grit. Spin them dry and put in a large serving bowl.
6. Add the beets and walnuts.
7. In a small bowl, combine the vinegar, salt, pepper, and chives. Slowly whisk in the oil until well-combined.
8. Drizzle the vinaigrette over the salad, toss well, and serve.
